cases.title: From Burnout to Balance
cases.challenge_md:
The founding team at Lumen was **running on empty**. Deadlines were slipping, two senior designers were close to quitting, and the founders hadn't taken a real day off in months.

They didn't need another productivity hack — they needed to change their relationship with work.
cases.approach_md:
We ran a three-month engagement combining:

1. **Weekly 1:1 coaching** with the two founders
2. **Two team workshops** on boundaries and sustainable focus
3. A simple daily grounding practice the whole team could share

The goal was steadier energy, not more hustle.
cases.results_md:
By month three the team had reclaimed their evenings and rebuilt trust.

- Stress scores dropped sharply on the team pulse survey
- Focus time tripled with protected deep-work blocks
- **Nobody quit** — and two people were promoted
cases.testimonial_md: > Maya gave our team the language and the space to slow down without losing momentum. It changed how we work.

downloads.title: The Daily Grounding Checklist
downloads.description_md:
## Five minutes to a steadier day

A one-page checklist you can keep on your desk or phone — five simple grounding steps to start the day clear and centred.

**Who it's for:** anyone who wakes up already behind.

- A 3-breath reset
- A 60-second body scan
- One intention for the day

shop.title: Mindful Mornings Journal
shop.description_md:
## A calmer start to every day

A **90-day guided journal** with morning intentions, gratitude prompts, and an evening reflection — designed to pair with your coaching sessions.

- Lay-flat binding, 160 pages
- Daily intention + gratitude prompts
- Weekly reflection spreads

[See a sample spread](https://example.com/journal-sample)
